channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.19%, highest since before the financial crisis
item.description: Global bond markets remain on edge as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation fears.

item.title: Trump says it's not a 'war.' Insurers with money on the line say it is
item.description: Businesses in the Middle East bought insurance that protects against terrorism or sabotage, but far fewer purchased coverage explicitly designed to cover "war."

item.title: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
item.description: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates as companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.

item.title: Trump says he was 'an hour away' from Iran strike decision before he postponed it
item.description: Asked how long Iran has to come to the table, Trump said it could be two or three days, or perhaps until Sunday or early next week.

item.title: Bessent urges G7 to help U.S. attack Iran's finances
item.description: The Iran war continues to wreak havoc on global oil supply and the broader economy, even as the conflict appears to be locked in an uneasy stalemate.

item.title: Investors are flooding out of cash to buy stocks. That 'bull capitulation' is a sell signal, Bank of America says
item.description: A contrarian signal just flashed, warning traders it could be time to get out of equities or limit exposure.

item.title: Blanche won't rule out Jan. 6 rioters getting Trump DOJ fund payouts
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche would not rule out Jan. 6 rioters receiving payouts from Trump’s new DOJ "anti-weaponization" fund.

item.title: Home Depot says core shopper is resilient in the face of higher gas prices, sales rise 5%
item.description: Home Depot beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, even as some shoppers pulled back on larger projects.

item.title: Here’s why car wash real estate is cleaning up
item.description: The car wash business has evolved markedly over the last decade as private equity investors flock to the recurring revenue.

item.title: Startup backed by American Eagle CEO reaches unicorn status in latest funding round
item.description: Radar, a hardware and software company that helps retailers better manage inventory and cut back on theft, is now valued at over $1 billion.

item.title: Putin in Beijing: 3 things Russia needs from China
item.description: Russia will be looking for energy and trade deals with China, as well as continuing geopolitical support.

item.title: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50: See the full list of companies, rankings, and a new leader in the AI race
item.description: CNBC reveals the 2026 Disruptor 50 list led by an increasingly powerful and highly valued group of AI companies.

item.title: Cuba condemns U.S. sanctions, accuses Washington of building ‘fraudulent case’ for military action
item.description: The comments come after a fresh wave of U.S. sanctions and amid mounting speculation that the U.S. could carry out military strikes against Cuba.

item.title: Michael Burry adds to beaten-down stocks while warning of echoes of dot-com bubble
item.description: The latest moves come as Burry has grown increasingly vocal about what he sees as speculative excesses tied to artificial intelligence.

item.title: Musk and Altman take their battle from court to Wall Street ahead of landmark IPOs
item.description: Now that the Musk-Altman trial has reached a verdict, the two billionaires can turn their attention to readying their companies for the public market.

item.title: Anthropic and U.S. government to face off in DC court over blacklisting of AI company
item.description: Anthropic sued the Defense Department in March after the agency declared the artificial intelligence startup a supply chain risk.

item.title: Prosthetics firm's stock plunges as it denies short-seller's Russia 'propaganda' allegations
item.description: German prosthetics firm Ottobock fell over 10% on Tuesday in the wake of a report published by US-based hedge fund Grizzly Research.

item.title: Target names ex-Walmart executive as supply chain chief in CEO's turnaround push
item.description: Target on Tuesday named former Walmart executive Jeff England as its chief supply chain officer.

item.title: Google I/O primer: Alphabet's AI showcase is its chance to wow Wall Street
item.description: After a 140% stock surge and a sweeping Wall Street reset, Google’s developer conference has to prove the AI story is more than a market narrative.

item.title: Oil prices edge lower as Trump postpones Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
item.description: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.

item.title: We're booking profits in a once-hated stock that's gone parabolic
item.description: The stock has rallied roughly 60% since the start of April.

item.title: How to avoid the travel fees quietly inflating your vacation costs
item.description: Financial products like airline and hotel credit cards can save you on checked bag and resort fees.

item.title: 'Doomjobbing' can hurt your job search, experts say: Why it happens and how to avoid it
item.description: Some job seekers are "doomjobbing" as a way to cope with the stress of unemployment.

item.title: Long Island Rail Road to resume operations as deal reached to end strike
item.description: The Long Island Rail Road is set to resume rolling on Tuesday after a deal was reached to end a strike that had shut down the commuter rail system.

item.title: Kentucky Republican Thomas Massie is Trump revenge tour's next target
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie will face off on Tuesday against a Trump-backed candidate in a Republican primary in Kentucky's 4th congressional district.

item.title: Why hybrids are ‘having their moment’ as EVs and gas-powered vehicles lose market share
item.description: Hybrids are the fastest-growing segment of the U.S. auto market as EV and gas-powered vehicle market share declines.

item.title: SpaceX’s ‘otherworldly’ debut could squeeze the oxygen from Europe’s IPO market, analysts say
item.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX, expected to debut next month, could squeeze investor demand for other IPOs.

item.title: White House adds generic drugs to direct-to-consumer TrumpRx site
item.description: Trump said he is increasing the number of products on the platform by nearly seven times, adding more than 600 generic drugs to the site.

item.title: Trump says he's 'concerned' about Ebola after American tests positive in Africa
item.description: The CDC earlier Monday said an American had tested positive for Ebola in Africa.

item.title: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50 list: Why Anthropic was No. 1 in this year's rankings
item.description: Anthropic, posting explosive growth for its powerful AI systems that enterprises trust, has leapfrogged OpenAI on the CNBC Disruptor 50 list as the new No. 1.
